headline: ExxonMobil to Release Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: SPRING, Texas, July 21, 2026--ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation (NYSE: XOM) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, July 31, 2026. The company will issue a press release via Business Wire that will be available at 5:30 a.m. CT at investor.exxonmobil.com.

headline: Oil At $90? Prediction Market Odds Jump, Bringing Energy ETFs Back in Focus

headline: Trump Went to War Convinced Iran Would 'Fold Really Quickly,' New Book Claims. Polymarket Prices a Ground Invasion at 27%
